zh.lifeSummary: 當Ida Odingsells於大約1265年出生在英國瓦維其可爾馬可斯托可時，她的父親Sir William de Odingsells II21歲，母親Ela FitzWalter31歲。她於1286年9月29日之後與John de Clinton在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1325年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾卡素 利波迪享年61歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾萊薩爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ida Odingsells于大约1265年出生在英国瓦維其可爾馬可斯托可时，她的父亲Sir William de Odingsells II21岁，母亲Ela FitzWalter31岁。她于1286年9月29日之后与John de Clinton在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1325年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾卡素 利波迪享年61岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾萊薩爾。

nameMeanings.name: Ida
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Norman name, of Germanic origin, derived from īd ‘work’. This died out during the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, influenced by its use in Tennyson's The Princess ( 1847 ) for the central character, who devotes herself to the cause of women's rights and women's education in a thoroughly Victorian way. The name is also associated with Mount Ida in Crete, which was connected in classical times with the worship of Zeus, king of the gods, who was supposed to have been brought up in a cave on the mountainside. In the 1930s it became famous as the name of the film star Ida Lupino ( 1914–1995 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Ida Odingsells was born about 1265, in Maxstoke, Warwickshire, England, her father, Sir William de Odingsells II, was 21 and her mother, Ela FitzWalter, was 31. She married John de Clinton after 29 September 1286, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1325, in Castle Liberty, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Wroxall, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ida Odingsells est née environ 1265, à Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Odingsells II, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Ela FitzWalter, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé John de Clinton après 29 septembre 1286, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1325, à Castle Liberty, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Wroxall, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ida Odingsells um 1265 in Maxstoke, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Odingsells II 21 und ihre Mutter Ela FitzWalter 31. Sie hat nach 29. September 1286 in England, United Kingdom John de Clinton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1325 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Castle Liberty, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wroxall, Warwickshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Ida Odingsellsが約1265年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアマクスストクで生まれた時，父Sir William de Odingsells IIは21歳，母Ela FitzWalterは31歳であった。1286年9月29日以後にイギリスイギリスでJohn de Clintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1325年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアカストル リバートイで61歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアウロクサルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ida Odingsells(이)가 대략 1265년 영국 워윅실르 맥스스토크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Odingsells II(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ela FitzWalter(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1286년 9월 29일 이후 영국 잉글랜드에서 John de Clinton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 카스틀 리버티에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 록스알에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ida Odingsells nasceu aproximadamente 1265, em Maxstoke, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Odingsells II, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Ela FitzWalter, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Clinton após 29 de setembro de 1286, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1325, em Castle Liberty, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Wroxall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ida Odingsells родилась около 1265 г. в местности макссток, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William de Odingsells II было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Ela FitzWalter, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Clinton после 29 сентябрь 1286 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1325 г. в местности кастл либирти, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности роксалл, варвиккшир, Англия.
